reviews.comment:
La siempre confiable ACA de Las Flores. Recibe tarjetas y carga la serviclub. Salva las papas. Tiene un parque de juegos infantil con un tobogán hermoso.

(Translated by Google)
The ever-reliable ACA in Las Flores. They accept credit cards and top up your Serviclub card. It's a lifesaver. They have a children's playground with a beautiful slide.
